shortDesc_en: The shampoo and conditioner we use at the wash basin every day.
shortDesc_el: The shampoo and conditioner we use at the wash basin every day.
longDesc_en: A pair of pH-balanced, colour-safe wash products from Davines. Light enough for daily use, kind enough for coloured hair.
longDesc_el: A pair of pH-balanced, colour-safe wash products from Davines. Light enough for daily use, kind enough for coloured hair.

shortDesc_en: Take-home strengthening treatment for chemically-stressed hair.
shortDesc_el: Take-home strengthening treatment for chemically-stressed hair.
longDesc_en: The Olaplex No.3 bond perfector. A weekly at-home treatment that rebuilds bonds in colour-treated and over-processed hair.
longDesc_el: The Olaplex No.3 bond perfector. A weekly at-home treatment that rebuilds bonds in colour-treated and over-processed hair.

shortDesc_en: Wella Professionals colour-safe shampoo. The one that won't fade your tones.
shortDesc_el: Wella Professionals colour-safe shampoo. The one that won't fade your tones.
longDesc_en: Wella Professionals' colour-safe wash, the workhorse on our wash basin. Sulphate-light, tone-true, gentle on the cuticle.
longDesc_el: Wella Professionals' colour-safe wash, the workhorse on our wash basin. Sulphate-light, tone-true, gentle on the cuticle.

shortDesc_en: The brush we reach for at the chair. Distributes natural oils, smooths shine.
shortDesc_el: The brush we reach for at the chair. Distributes natural oils, smooths shine.
longDesc_en: A natural boar-bristle round brush. Distributes scalp oils through the length, smooths the cuticle, and gives a salon-shine finish.
longDesc_el: A natural boar-bristle round brush. Distributes scalp oils through the length, smooths the cuticle, and gives a salon-shine finish.

shortDesc_en: A finishing serum for shine and smoothness. Three drops, that is all.
shortDesc_el: A finishing serum for shine and smoothness. Three drops, that is all.
longDesc_en: A weightless silicone-free glossing serum. Three drops through the ends, finger-comb, done. The bottle we never travel without.
longDesc_el: A weightless silicone-free glossing serum. Three drops through the ends, finger-comb, done. The bottle we never travel without.

shortDesc_en: Redeemable on any service or product. The kindest little thank-you.
shortDesc_el: Redeemable on any service or product. The kindest little thank-you.
longDesc_en: A Maison Loré gift card, redeemable on any service or product. The kindest little thank-you for someone who loves a properly done blow-dry.
